title: Taiwan’s Former President Meets Xi Jinping During China Trip
description: Ma Ying-jeou of the opposition KMT held a second meeting with Xi Jinping – his first as a private citizen – during an 11-day trip to China.
keywords: Diplomacy, East Asia, China, Taiwan, 1992 Consensus, Cross-Strait Relations, KMT cross-strait policy, Ma Ying-jeou, Ma Ying-jeou China trip, Ma Ying-jeou-Xi Jinping meeting
snippet:
Ma Ying-jeou of the opposition KMT held a second meeting with Xi Jinping – his first as a private citizen – during an 11-day trip to China.
